item.title: FlipFocus - Product Documentation
item.description:
Product Overview

FlipFocus is a minimalist flip clock application with an integrated Pomodoro timer, designed to help users stay focused and productive. The app features a beautiful flip clock display, customizable themes, and seamless integration with iOS system features like Live Activity and Dynamic Island.

Target Users

User Type Use Case
Students Study timer, exam preparation, focus sessions
Remote Workers Work sprints, meeting countdowns, desk clock
Creatives Deep work sessions, distraction-free environment
General Users Bedside clock, aesthetic desk display

Core Features

1. Flip Clock Display

A classic flip clock with smooth page-turning animations.
item.content:
Product Overview

FlipFocus is a minimalist flip clock application with an integrated Pomodoro timer, designed to help users stay focused and productive. The app features a beautiful flip clock display, customizable themes, and seamless integration with iOS system features like Live Activity and Dynamic Island.

Target Users

User Type Use Case
Students Study timer, exam preparation, focus sessions
Remote Workers Work sprints, meeting countdowns, desk clock
Creatives Deep work sessions, distraction-free environment
General Users Bedside clock, aesthetic desk display

Core Features

1. Flip Clock Display

A classic flip clock with smooth page-turning animations.

Specifications:

  • Real-time clock display with hours and minutes
  • Smooth flip animation for digit transitions (1.5s duration)
  • Breathing colon animation (optional)
  • Auto-hide UI controls after 5 seconds of inactivity
  • Tap to reveal controls

Technical Details:

  • Animation: Custom SwiftUI flip animation using 3D rotation
  • Update frequency: 1 second interval
  • Font: System font with customizable weight and size

2. Pomodoro Timer

A productivity timer based on the Pomodoro Technique.

Timer Configuration:

Session Type Duration Color
Focus 25 minutes Red
Short Break 5 minutes Green
Long Break 15 minutes Green
Paused - Yellow

Cycle Structure:

Round 1: Focus (25m) → Short Break (5m)
Round 2: Focus (25m) → Short Break (5m)
Round 3: Focus (25m) → Short Break (5m)
Round 4: Focus (25m) → Long Break (15m)
→ Cycle repeats

Controls:

  • Play/Pause: Start or pause the current session
  • Reset: Return to initial state (Focus, 25:00)
  • Skip: Jump to the next session

Visual Indicators:

  • Circular progress ring showing remaining time
  • Round indicator dots (4 dots showing completed rounds)
  • State icon (flame for focus, leaf for break, pause for paused)

3. Live Activity & Dynamic Island

Real-time timer display on Lock Screen and Dynamic Island.

Supported Devices:

  • Live Activity: iPhone with iOS 16.1+
  • Dynamic Island: iPhone 14 Pro, iPhone 14 Pro Max, iPhone 15 series

Display Modes:

Mode Left Side Right Side
Compact State icon Progress ring
Expanded Icon + State text Round indicators
Minimal Progress ring -
Lock Screen Timer in ring State + Rounds

Data Sync:

  • Updates every second during active timer
  • Displays paused time when timer is paused
  • Ends automatically when timer is reset

4. Home Screen Widgets

Quick glance widgets for the Home Screen.

Widget Sizes:

Size Content Dimensions
Small Time display 155 x 155 pt
Medium Date + Time 329 x 155 pt

Features:

  • Light and dark mode support
  • Rounded font design
  • Monospaced digits for consistent layout
  • Updates every minute

5. Customization Options

Background Colors (16 options):

Category Colors
Blacks Pure Black, Charcoal, Dark Gray, Graphite
Blues Navy, Midnight, Ocean, Slate
Greens Dark Green, Forest
Browns Dark Brown, Espresso
Reds Dark Red, Wine
Purples Dark Purple, Plum

Adjustable Settings:

  • Clock font size (0.8x - 1.2x)
  • Clock digit opacity (50% - 100%)
  • Colon opacity (30% - 80%)
  • Colon breathing animation (on/off)
  • Pomodoro font size (0.8x - 1.2x)
  • Pomodoro opacity (50% - 100%)

6. Localization

Supported Languages (30):

Region Languages
East Asia Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Japanese, Korean
South Asia Hindi
Southeast Asia Indonesian, Malay, Thai, Vietnamese
Middle East Arabic, Hebrew, Turkish
Europe English, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian, Czech, Romanian, Hungarian, Greek, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish

Localized Content:

  • All UI text
  • Settings labels
  • Background color names
  • App name on Home Screen (via InfoPlist.strings)

User Flows

Flow 1: Basic Clock Usage

1. Open App → Flip Clock displayed
2. Wait 5s → Controls auto-hide
3. Tap screen → Controls appear
4. Tap Settings → Customize appearance
5. Swipe left → Switch to Pomodoro

Flow 2: Pomodoro Session

1. Swipe to Pomodoro view
2. Tap Play → Timer starts (25:00)
3. Live Activity appears on Lock Screen
4. Timer counts down
5. At 0:00 → Haptic feedback → Auto-switch to Break
6. Complete 4 rounds → Long Break
7. Tap Reset → Return to initial state

Flow 3: Widget Setup

1. Long press Home Screen → Edit mode
2. Tap + → Search "FlipFocus"
3. Select widget size (Small/Medium)
4. Place widget → Done

Technical Architecture

Project Structure

FashionClock/
├── FashionClock/
│   ├── FashionClockApp.swift      # App entry point
│   ├── ContentView.swift           # Main container view
│   ├── Views/
│   │   ├── FlipClockView.swift     # Flip clock display
│   │   ├── FlipDigitView.swift     # Single digit with animation
│   │   └── PomodoroView.swift      # Pomodoro timer
│   ├── Models/
│   │   ├── Settings.swift          # App settings (ObservableObject)
│   │   ├── PomodoroTimer.swift     # Timer logic
│   │   └── LiveActivityManager.swift # Live Activity control
│   ├── Ads/
│   │   └── AdManager.swift         # Google AdMob integration
│   └── Resources/
│       └── [30 language].lproj/    # Localization files
│
└── FlipFocusWidget/
    ├── FlipFocusWidget.swift       # Home Screen widget
    ├── FlipFocusWidgetLiveActivity.swift # Live Activity UI
    └── FlipFocusWidgetBundle.swift # Widget bundle

Key Technologies

Technology Usage
SwiftUI All UI components
ActivityKit Live Activity & Dynamic Island
WidgetKit Home Screen widgets
Combine Reactive data binding
UserDefaults Settings persistence
Google AdMob Monetization
UMP SDK GDPR consent management

Minimum Requirements

Requirement Value
iOS Version 16.0+
Widget Extension iOS 17.0+
Live Activity iOS 16.2+
Dynamic Island iPhone 14 Pro+

Monetization

Ad Strategy

Ad Type Placement First Day
Banner Settings page bottom Shown
Interstitial After closing Settings Hidden
Rewarded Future feature Hidden

First Day Policy:

  • Banner ads: Always shown
  • Interstitial ads: Hidden for first 24 hours after install
  • Improves user experience and retention

Ad Networks

  • Google AdMob (primary)
  • SKAdNetwork integration for attribution

Privacy & Compliance

Data Collection

Data Type Collected Purpose
Device ID Yes (AdMob) Advertising
Usage Data Yes (AdMob) Analytics
Personal Data No -
Location No -

Compliance

  • GDPR: UMP SDK for consent management
  • CCPA: Supported via UMP SDK
  • ATT: App Tracking Transparency implemented
  • COPPA: Not targeted at children (4+ rating)

Version History

Version 1.0.0 (Initial Release)

Features:

  • Flip clock with smooth animations
  • Pomodoro timer (25/5/15 min)
  • Live Activity & Dynamic Island support
  • Home Screen widgets (Small, Medium)
  • 16 background color options
  • 30 language support
  • Google AdMob integration
  • Accessibility support (VoiceOver)

Future Roadmap

Version Planned Features
1.1 Custom timer durations, Sound notifications
1.2 Apple Watch app
1.3 Statistics & history tracking
1.4 iCloud sync, Multiple timer presets

Support Information

Resource Link
Email levi.duan.arts@gmail.com
App Store https://apps.apple.com/app/id6756367564

Document Info

Field Value
Version 1.0
Last Updated December 2025
Author Levi

This Terms of Service should be read together with our Privacy Policy.

1. Acceptance of Terms

item.content:
Product Overview

Terms of Service / 服务条款

Last Updated: December 2025

English Version

This Terms of Service should be read together with our Privacy Policy.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, or using SG Bus Lah! (“the App”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the App.

2. Description of Service

SG Bus Lah! is a public transport companion app for Singapore that provides:

  • Real-time bus arrival information
  • MRT/LRT route planning
  • Nearby stops discovery
  • Trip tracking and navigation
  • Arrival alerts and notifications

3. Data Sources

The App uses data from:

  • LTA DataMall: Real-time bus arrival and route information
  • OneMap: Map and route planning services

All transport data is owned and provided by their respective providers. We do not create or modify transport data.

We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of this data. The actual bus arrival times may differ from the information displayed.

4. Use of the App

You agree to:

  • Use the App only for personal, non-commercial purposes
  • Not attempt to reverse engineer, modify, or distribute the App
  • Not use the App in any way that violates applicable laws
  • Not interfere with or disrupt the App’s functionality

5. Location Permission Use

The App may request access to your device location in order to show nearby bus stops and plan routes. Location data is processed only on-device and is not stored on our servers. You can control location permissions through your device settings at any time.

6. Advertisements

The App displays advertisements provided by Google AdMob. By using the App, you acknowledge that:

  • Ads may be personalized based on your device information
  • You can opt-out of personalized ads via App Tracking Transparency
  • Ad content is provided by third parties and we are not responsible for it

7. In-App Purchases

The App offers an optional “Remove Ads” purchase. All purchases are:

  • Final and non-refundable (except as required by law)
  • Processed through Apple’s App Store
  • Subject to Apple’s terms and conditions

8. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE APP IS PROVIDED “AS IS” WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. WE DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

  • Accuracy of bus arrival times
  • Availability of the service
  • Fitness for a particular purpose
  • Non-infringement

9. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

  • Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
  • Loss arising from reliance on information provided by the App
  • Missed buses or transportation delays
  • Any damages exceeding the amount you paid for the App (if any)

10. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

11. Severability

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid, that provision will be limited or eliminated to the minimum extent necessary so that these Terms will otherwise remain in full force and effect.

12. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and us regarding the use of the App and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.

13. Governing Law

These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Singapore.

14. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact us at: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

中文版本

本服务条款应与我们的隐私政策一并阅读。

1. 条款接受

下载、安装或使用 SG Bus Lah!（以下简称"本应用"），即表示您同意受本服务条款的约束。如果您不同意这些条款，请不要使用本应用。

2. 服务描述

SG Bus Lah! 是新加坡公共交通伴侣应用，提供：

  • 实时公交到站信息
  • 地铁/轻轨路线规划
  • 附近站点发现
  • 行程追踪和导航
  • 到站提醒和通知

3. 数据来源

本应用使用以下数据：

  • LTA DataMall：实时公交到站和路线信息
  • OneMap：地图和路线规划服务

所有公共交通数据均由相关数据提供方拥有并提供，我们不创建或修改交通数据。

我们不保证这些数据的准确性、完整性或时效性。实际公交到站时间可能与显示信息有所不同。

4. 应用使用

您同意：

  • 仅将本应用用于个人非商业目的
  • 不尝试逆向工程、修改或分发本应用
  • 不以任何违反适用法律的方式使用本应用
  • 不干扰或破坏本应用的功能

5. 定位权限使用

本应用可能会请求访问您的设备定位，用于显示附近公交站点和路线规划。定位数据仅在设备本地处理，我们不会将其存储到服务器。您可以随时通过设备设置控制定位权限。

6. 广告

本应用展示由 Google AdMob 提供的广告。使用本应用即表示您确认：

  • 广告可能根据您的设备信息进行个性化
  • 您可以通过 App Tracking Transparency 选择退出个性化广告
  • 广告内容由第三方提供，我们对此不承担责任

7. 应用内购买

本应用提供可选的"移除广告"购买。所有购买：

  • 最终且不可退款（法律要求除外）
  • 通过 Apple App Store 处理
  • 受 Apple 条款和条件约束

8. 免责声明

本应用按"原样"提供，不提供任何形式的保证。我们否认所有保证，包括但不限于：

  • 公交到站时间的准确性
  • 服务的可用性
  • 特定用途的适用性
  • 不侵权

9. 责任限制

在法律允许的最大范围内，我们不对以下情况承担责任：

  • 任何间接、附带或后果性损害
  • 因依赖本应用提供的信息而造成的损失
  • 错过公交或交通延误
  • 超过您为本应用支付金额（如有）的任何损害

10. 条款变更

我们保留随时修改这些条款的权利。条款变更后继续使用本应用即表示接受新条款。

11. 可分割性

如果本条款的任何条款被认定为不可执行或无效，该条款将被限制或消除至最小必要程度，以使本条款的其余部分仍然有效和可执行。

12. 完整协议

本条款与我们的隐私政策共同构成您与我们之间关于使用本应用的完整协议，并取代所有先前的协议和理解。

13. 适用法律

本条款应受新加坡法律管辖并据其解释。

14. 联系方式

如对本条款有疑问，请联系：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

© 2025 SG Bus Lah! All rights reserved.

item.description:

item.content:
Privacy Policy / 隐私政策 / プライバシーポリシー

Multi-Language Privacy Policy for FlipFocus

# Language Section
1 English Privacy Policy
2 简体中文 隐私政策
3 繁體中文 隱私權政策
4 日本語 プライバシーポリシー
5 한국어 개인정보처리방침
6 Deutsch Datenschutzrichtlinie
7 Français Politique de Confidentialité
8 Español Política de Privacidad
9 Português Política de Privacidade
10 Русский Политика конфиденциальности
11 العربية سياسة الخصوصية
12 हिन्दी गोपनीयता नीति
13 Tiếng Việt Chính Sách Bảo Mật
14 ไทย นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัว
15 Italiano Informativa sulla Privacy

1. English

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: December 10, 2025

Introduction

Welcome to FlipFocus (“we,” “our,” or “us”). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application FlipFocus (the “App”).

By using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Information We Collect

Data Collected by FlipFocus

FlipFocus does not collect any personal data directly. We do not collect, store, or transmit:

  • Personal identification information (name, email, phone number)
  • Location data
  • Contacts or address book information
  • Photos or media files
  • Health or fitness data
  • Financial information
  • User-generated content

Data Collected by Third-Party Services

However, third-party advertising services integrated into our App may collect certain information automatically. Specifically, Google AdMob may collect the following data:

Data Type Purpose Collected By
Device Identifier (IDFA) Personalized advertising, cross-app ad tracking, ad performance measurement Google AdMob
IP Address Fraud prevention, approximate location for ad targeting, analytics Google AdMob
Device Information Ad optimization, device compatibility Google AdMob
App Usage Data Analytics, ad frequency capping Google AdMob

Important: Device identifiers may be used to deliver personalized ads across apps and websites, and to measure advertising performance. This data is collected and processed by Google, not by FlipFocus.

Information Stored Locally

The following data is stored only on your device and is never transmitted to any server:

  • App settings and preferences
  • Timer configurations
  • Display customization options

How Your Information Is Used

The data collected by third-party services is used for the following purposes:

  1. Advertising: To display relevant advertisements within the App
  2. Cross-App Tracking: To deliver personalized ads across different apps and measure ad effectiveness
  3. Analytics: To understand how users interact with the App
  4. Fraud Prevention: To detect and prevent fraudulent activity

Third-Party Services

Our App integrates with the following third-party services:

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob collects and processes data according to Google’s Privacy Policy. This includes:

  • Device Identifiers: May be used to deliver personalized ads across apps and measure ad performance
  • IP Address: Collected by Google for fraud prevention and approximate geographic targeting
  • Usage Data: Collected to optimize ad delivery and frequency

All advertising data is collected, processed, and stored by Google according to their privacy practices. FlipFocus does not have access to or control over this data.

  • Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

Apple Services

We integrate with Apple’s system features:

  • WidgetKit: For Home Screen widgets (no data collection)
  • ActivityKit: For Live Activities (no data collection)

These Apple services do not collect or transmit any personal data.

Advertising and Your Choices

Personalized Advertising

By default, ads may be personalized based on your interests and activity across apps. Device identifiers may be used for cross-app advertising tracking.

You can opt out of personalized advertising and tracking:

  1. iOS Settings: Go to Settings > Privacy & Security > Tracking > Turn off “Allow Apps to Request to Track”
  2. In-App Consent: When prompted by the App Tracking Transparency dialog, tap “Ask App Not to Track”
  3. Reset Advertising Identifier: Go to Settings > Privacy & Security > Apple Advertising > Reset Advertising Identifier

Non-Personalized Ads

If you opt out of tracking, you will still see ads, but they will not be personalized based on your activity.

Children’s Privacy

FlipFocus is rated 4+ and is suitable for all ages. However:

  • We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 years of age
  • We do not share any children’s data with third parties for advertising purposes
  • The third-party advertising SDK (Google AdMob) is configured to comply with applicable children’s privacy laws
  • If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child’s data has been collected inappropriately, please contact us immediately

We comply with the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) and similar regulations worldwide.

Data Security

We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

  • All data transmission uses secure protocols (HTTPS/TLS)
  • Local data is stored using iOS secure storage mechanisms
  • We do not operate servers that store your personal data
  • Third-party services use industry-standard security practices

Data Retention

  • Local Data: Stored on your device until you delete the App or clear App data
  • Advertising Data: All collected advertising data is managed by Google AdMob according to their data retention policies. FlipFocus does not retain any advertising data.

Data Storage

FlipFocus does not operate any servers that store user data. All advertising data collected through the App is stored and managed by the respective third-party providers (Google) according to their privacy policies and data retention practices.

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

For All Users

  • Opt-Out of Tracking: Disable ad tracking via iOS Settings
  • Delete Local Data: Uninstall the App to remove all locally stored data
  • Reset Advertising ID: Reset your device’s advertising identifier

For EU/EEA Users (GDPR)

  • Right to access your data
  • Right to rectification
  • Right to erasure (“right to be forgotten”)
  • Right to restrict processing
  • Right to data portability
  • Right to object to processing

For data held by Google, please refer to Google’s Privacy Policy for exercising these rights.

For California Users (CCPA)

  • Right to know what personal information is collected
  • Right to delete personal information
  • Right to opt-out of the sale of personal information (we do not sell data)
  • Right to non-discrimination

International Data Transfers

If you are located outside the United States, please note that data collected by Google AdMob may be transferred to and processed in the United States or other countries where Google operates servers.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by:

  • Posting the new Privacy Policy in the App
  • Updating the “Last Updated” date at the top of this document

We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your privacy rights, please contact us:

Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Summary

Category Details
Direct Data Collection None
Third-Party Data Collection Yes (Google AdMob)
Cross-App Tracking Yes (opt-out available)
Children’s Data Not collected or shared

This Privacy Policy is effective as of December 10, 2025.

2. 简体中文

隐私政策

最后更新：2025年12月10日

简介

欢迎使用 FlipFocus（以下简称"我们"）。我们尊重您的隐私，并致力于保护您的个人数据。本隐私政策说明了当您使用我们的移动应用程序 FlipFocus（以下简称"应用"）时，我们如何收集、使用和保护您的信息。

使用本应用即表示您同意按照本隐私政策收集和使用信息。

我们收集的信息

FlipFocus 收集的数据

FlipFocus 不直接收集任何个人数据。我们不收集、存储或传输：

  • 个人身份信息（姓名、电子邮件、电话号码）
  • 位置数据
  • 通讯录或地址簿信息
  • 照片或媒体文件
  • 健康或健身数据
  • 财务信息
  • 用户生成的内容

第三方服务收集的数据

但是，集成到我们应用中的第三方广告服务可能会自动收集某些信息。具体而言，Google AdMob 可能会收集以下数据：

数据类型 用途 收集方
设备标识符 (IDFA) 个性化广告、跨应用广告追踪、广告效果衡量 Google AdMob
IP 地址 防欺诈、大致位置定位、分析 Google AdMob
设备信息 广告优化、设备兼容性 Google AdMob
应用使用数据 分析、广告频率控制 Google AdMob

重要提示：设备标识符可能被用于在不同应用和网站上投放个性化广告，并衡量广告效果。这些数据由 Google 收集和处理，而非 FlipFocus。

本地存储的信息

以下数据仅存储在您的设备上，永远不会传输到任何服务器：

  • 应用设置和偏好
  • 计时器配置
  • 显示自定义选项

您的信息如何被使用

第三方服务收集的数据用于以下目的：

  1. 广告：在应用内展示相关广告
  2. 跨应用追踪：在不同应用间投放个性化广告并衡量广告效果
  3. 分析：了解用户如何与应用互动
  4. 防欺诈：检测和防止欺诈活动

第三方服务

我们的应用集成了以下第三方服务：

Google AdMob

我们使用 Google AdMob 展示广告。AdMob 根据 Google 的隐私政策收集和处理数据。这包括：

  • 设备标识符：可能被用于在不同应用间投放个性化广告并衡量广告效果
  • IP 地址：由 Google 收集用于防欺诈和大致地理位置定位
  • 使用数据：收集以优化广告投放和频率

所有广告数据由 Google 根据其隐私政策收集、处理和存储。FlipFocus 无法访问或控制这些数据。

  • Google 隐私政策：https://policies.google.com/privacy

Apple 服务

我们集成了 Apple 的系统功能：

  • WidgetKit：用于主屏幕小组件（不收集数据）
  • ActivityKit：用于实时活动（不收集数据）

这些 Apple 服务不收集或传输任何个人数据。

广告和您的选择

个性化广告

默认情况下，广告可能会根据您在各应用中的兴趣和活动进行个性化。设备标识符可能被用于跨应用广告追踪。

您可以选择退出个性化广告和追踪：

  1. iOS 设置：前往设置 > 隐私与安全 > 追踪 > 关闭"允许应用请求追踪"
  2. 应用内同意：当出现应用追踪透明度对话框时，点击"要求应用不跟踪"
  3. 重置广告标识符：前往设置 > 隐私与安全 > Apple 广告 > 重置广告标识符

非个性化广告

如果您选择退出追踪，您仍会看到广告，但这些广告不会基于您的活动进行个性化。

儿童隐私

FlipFocus 分级为 4+，适合所有年龄段。但是：

  • 我们不会故意收集 13 岁以下儿童的个人信息
  • 我们不会将任何儿童数据分享给第三方用于广告目的
  • 第三方广告 SDK（Google AdMob）已配置为符合适用的儿童隐私法规
  • 如果您是父母或监护人，并认为您孩子的数据被不当收集，请立即联系我们

我们遵守《儿童在线隐私保护法》（COPPA）及全球类似法规。

数据安全

我们采取适当的技术和组织措施来保护您的数据：

  • 所有数据传输使用安全协议（HTTPS/TLS）
  • 本地数据使用 iOS 安全存储机制存储
  • 我们不运营存储您个人数据的服务器
  • 第三方服务使用行业标准的安全措施

数据保留

  • 本地数据：存储在您的设备上，直到您删除应用或清除应用数据
  • 广告数据：所有收集的广告数据由 Google AdMob 根据其数据保留政策管理。FlipFocus 不保留任何广告数据。

数据存储

FlipFocus 不运营存储用户数据的服务器。通过应用收集的所有广告数据由相应的第三方提供商（Google）根据其隐私政策和数据保留实践存储和管理。

您的权利

根据您所在的位置，您可能拥有以下权利：

所有用户

  • 选择退出追踪：通过 iOS 设置禁用广告追踪
  • 删除本地数据：卸载应用以删除所有本地存储的数据
  • 重置广告 ID：重置设备的广告标识符

欧盟/欧洲经济区用户（GDPR）

  • 访问您的数据的权利
  • 更正权
  • 删除权（“被遗忘权”）
  • 限制处理权
  • 数据可携带权
  • 反对处理权

对于 Google 持有的数据，请参阅 Google 的隐私政策以行使这些权利。

加利福尼亚州用户（CCPA）

  • 了解收集了哪些个人信息的权利
  • 删除个人信息的权利
  • 选择退出出售个人信息的权利（我们不出售数据）
  • 不受歧视的权利

国际数据传输

如果您位于美国境外，请注意 Google AdMob 收集的数据可能会传输到美国或 Google 运营服务器的其他国家进行处理。

本隐私政策的变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。我们将通过以下方式通知您任何变更：

  • 在应用中发布新的隐私政策
  • 更新本文档顶部的"最后更新"日期

我们鼓励您定期查看本隐私政策。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问或希望行使您的隐私权利，请联系我们：

电子邮件：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

第三方数据收集 是（Google AdMob）
跨应用追踪 是（可选择退出）

3. 繁體中文

隱私權政策

最後更新：2025年12月10日

簡介

歡迎使用 FlipFocus（以下簡稱「我們」）。我們尊重您的隱私，並致力於保護您的個人資料。本隱私權政策說明當您使用我們的行動應用程式 FlipFocus（以下簡稱「應用程式」）時，我們如何收集、使用和保護您的資訊。

使用本應用程式即表示您同意按照本隱私權政策收集和使用資訊。

我們收集的資訊

FlipFocus 收集的資料

FlipFocus 不直接收集任何個人資料。我們不收集、儲存或傳輸：

  • 個人身份資訊（姓名、電子郵件、電話號碼）
  • 位置資料
  • 通訊錄或地址簿資訊
  • 照片或媒體檔案
  • 健康或健身資料
  • 財務資訊
  • 使用者產生的內容

第三方服務收集的資料

但是，整合到我們應用程式中的第三方廣告服務可能會自動收集某些資訊。具體而言，Google AdMob 可能會收集以下資料：

資料類型 用途 收集方
裝置識別碼 (IDFA) 個人化廣告、跨應用程式廣告追蹤、廣告效果衡量 Google AdMob
IP 位址 防詐騙、大致位置定位、分析 Google AdMob
裝置資訊 廣告最佳化、裝置相容性 Google AdMob
應用程式使用資料 分析、廣告頻率控制 Google AdMob

重要提示：裝置識別碼可能被用於在不同應用程式和網站上投放個人化廣告，並衡量廣告效果。這些資料由 Google 收集和處理，而非 FlipFocus。

本地儲存的資訊

以下資料僅儲存在您的裝置上，永遠不會傳輸到任何伺服器：

  • 應用程式設定和偏好
  • 計時器配置
  • 顯示自訂選項

您的資訊如何被使用

第三方服務收集的資料用於以下目的：

  1. 廣告：在應用程式內展示相關廣告
  2. 跨應用程式追蹤：在不同應用程式間投放個人化廣告並衡量廣告效果
  3. 分析：了解使用者如何與應用程式互動
  4. 防詐騙：檢測和防止詐騙活動

第三方服務

我們的應用程式整合了以下第三方服務：

Google AdMob

我們使用 Google AdMob 展示廣告。AdMob 根據 Google 的隱私政策收集和處理資料。這包括：

  • 裝置識別碼：可能被用於在不同應用程式間投放個人化廣告並衡量廣告效果
  • IP 位址：由 Google 收集用於防詐騙和大致地理位置定位
  • 使用資料：收集以最佳化廣告投放和頻率

所有廣告資料由 Google 根據其隱私政策收集、處理和儲存。FlipFocus 無法存取或控制這些資料。

  • Google 隱私政策：https://policies.google.com/privacy

Apple 服務

我們整合了 Apple 的系統功能：

  • WidgetKit：用於主畫面小工具（不收集資料）
  • ActivityKit：用於即時動態（不收集資料）

這些 Apple 服務不收集或傳輸任何個人資料。

廣告和您的選擇

個人化廣告

預設情況下，廣告可能會根據您在各應用程式中的興趣和活動進行個人化。裝置識別碼可能被用於跨應用程式廣告追蹤。

您可以選擇退出個人化廣告和追蹤：

  1. iOS 設定：前往設定 > 隱私權與安全性 > 追蹤 > 關閉「允許 App 請求追蹤」
  2. 應用程式內同意：當出現 App 追蹤透明度對話方塊時，點擊「要求 App 不追蹤」
  3. 重置廣告識別碼：前往設定 > 隱私權與安全性 > Apple 廣告 > 重置廣告識別碼

非個人化廣告

如果您選擇退出追蹤，您仍會看到廣告，但這些廣告不會基於您的活動進行個人化。

兒童隱私

FlipFocus 分級為 4+，適合所有年齡層。但是：

  • 我們不會故意收集 13 歲以下兒童的個人資訊
  • 我們不會將任何兒童資料分享給第三方用於廣告目的
  • 第三方廣告 SDK（Google AdMob）已配置為符合適用的兒童隱私法規
  • 如果您是父母或監護人，並認為您孩子的資料被不當收集，請立即聯絡我們

我們遵守《兒童線上隱私保護法》（COPPA）及全球類似法規。

資料安全

我們採取適當的技術和組織措施來保護您的資料：

  • 所有資料傳輸使用安全協定（HTTPS/TLS）
  • 本地資料使用 iOS 安全儲存機制儲存
  • 我們不運營儲存您個人資料的伺服器
  • 第三方服務使用業界標準的安全措施

資料保留

  • 本地資料：儲存在您的裝置上，直到您刪除應用程式或清除應用程式資料
  • 廣告資料：所有收集的廣告資料由 Google AdMob 根據其資料保留政策管理。FlipFocus 不保留任何廣告資料。

資料儲存

FlipFocus 不運營儲存使用者資料的伺服器。透過應用程式收集的所有廣告資料由相應的第三方提供商（Google）根據其隱私政策和資料保留實務儲存和管理。

您的權利

根據您所在的位置，您可能擁有以下權利：

所有使用者

  • 選擇退出追蹤：透過 iOS 設定停用廣告追蹤
  • 刪除本地資料：解除安裝應用程式以刪除所有本地儲存的資料
  • 重置廣告 ID：重置裝置的廣告識別碼

歐盟/歐洲經濟區使用者（GDPR）

  • 存取您的資料的權利
  • 更正權
  • 刪除權（「被遺忘權」）
  • 限制處理權
  • 資料可攜帶權
  • 反對處理權

對於 Google 持有的資料，請參閱 Google 的隱私政策以行使這些權利。

加州使用者（CCPA）

  • 了解收集了哪些個人資訊的權利
  • 刪除個人資訊的權利
  • 選擇退出出售個人資訊的權利（我們不出售資料）
  • 不受歧視的權利

國際資料傳輸

如果您位於美國境外，請注意 Google AdMob 收集的資料可能會傳輸到美國或 Google 運營伺服器的其他國家進行處理。

本隱私權政策的變更

我們可能會不時更新本隱私權政策。我們將透過以下方式通知您任何變更：

  • 在應用程式中發布新的隱私權政策
  • 更新本文件頂部的「最後更新」日期

我們鼓勵您定期查看本隱私權政策。

聯絡我們

如果您對本隱私權政策有任何疑問或希望行使您的隱私權利，請聯絡我們：

電子郵件：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

第三方資料收集 是（Google AdMob）
跨應用程式追蹤 是（可選擇退出）
兒童資料 不收集或分享

4. 日本語

プライバシーポリシー

最終更新日：2025年12月10日

はじめに

FlipFocus（以下「当社」）へようこそ。当社はお客様のプライバシーを尊重し、個人データの保護に努めています。本プライバシーポリシーは、当社のモバイルアプリケーション FlipFocus（以下「アプリ」）をご利用の際に、当社がお客様の情報をどのように収集、使用、保護するかを説明します。

本アプリを使用することにより、お客様は本プライバシーポリシーに従った情報の収集と使用に同意したものとみなされます。

収集する情報

FlipFocus が収集するデータ

FlipFocus は個人データを直接収集しません。当社は以下を収集、保存、送信しません：

  • 個人識別情報（氏名、メールアドレス、電話番号）
  • 位置情報
  • 連絡先またはアドレス帳情報
  • 写真またはメディアファイル
  • 健康またはフィットネスデータ
  • 財務情報
  • ユーザー生成コンテンツ

第三者サービスによるデータ収集

ただし、当社のアプリに統合されている第三者広告サービスは、特定の情報を自動的に収集する場合があります。具体的には、Google AdMob が以下のデータを収集する可能性があります：

データタイプ 目的 収集者
デバイス識別子 (IDFA) パーソナライズ広告、クロスアプリ広告追跡、広告効果測定 Google AdMob
IPアドレス 不正防止、おおよその位置ターゲティング、分析 Google AdMob
デバイス情報 広告最適化、デバイス互換性 Google AdMob
アプリ使用データ 分析、広告頻度制限 Google AdMob

重要：デバイス識別子は、アプリやウェブサイト間でパーソナライズされた広告を配信し、広告パフォーマンスを測定するために使用される場合があります。このデータは FlipFocus ではなく、Google によって収集・処理されます。

広告とお客様の選択

パーソナライズ広告とトラッキングをオプトアウトできます：

  1. iOS設定：設定 > プライバシーとセキュリティ > トラッキング > 「Appからのトラッキング要求を許可」をオフ
  2. アプリ内同意：Appトラッキング透明性ダイアログが表示されたら、「Appにトラッキングしないよう要求」をタップ

子どものプライバシー

FlipFocus は4+に評価されており、すべての年齢層に適しています。当社は13歳未満の子どもから個人情報を故意に収集せず、広告目的で子どものデータを第三者と共有することもありません。

お問い合わせ

本プライバシーポリシーについてご質問がある場合は、以下までお問い合わせください：

メール：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

カテゴリ 詳細

第三者データ収集 あり（Google AdMob）
クロスアプリトラッキング あり（オプトアウト可能）
子どものデータ 収集・共有なし

5. 한국어

개인정보처리방침

최종 업데이트: 2025년 12월 10일

소개

FlipFocus(이하 “당사”)에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 당사는 귀하의 개인정보를 존중하며 개인 데이터 보호에 최선을 다하고 있습니다. 본 개인정보처리방침은 당사의 모바일 애플리케이션 FlipFocus(이하 “앱”)를 사용할 때 귀하의 정보를 어떻게 수집, 사용 및 보호하는지 설명합니다.

본 앱을 사용함으로써 귀하는 본 개인정보처리방침에 따른 정보 수집 및 사용에 동의하는 것으로 간주됩니다.

수집하는 정보

FlipFocus가 수집하는 데이터

FlipFocus는 개인 데이터를 직접 수집하지 않습니다. 당사는 다음을 수집, 저장 또는 전송하지 않습니다:

  • 개인 식별 정보(이름, 이메일, 전화번호)
  • 위치 데이터
  • 연락처 또는 주소록 정보
  • 사진 또는 미디어 파일
  • 건강 또는 피트니스 데이터
  • 재무 정보
  • 사용자 생성 콘텐츠

제3자 서비스가 수집하는 데이터

그러나 당사 앱에 통합된 제3자 광고 서비스는 특정 정보를 자동으로 수집할 수 있습니다. 구체적으로 Google AdMob은 다음 데이터를 수집할 수 있습니다:

데이터 유형 목적 수집자
기기 식별자 (IDFA) 맞춤 광고, 크로스앱 광고 추적, 광고 성과 측정 Google AdMob
IP 주소 사기 방지, 대략적인 위치 타겟팅, 분석 Google AdMob
기기 정보 광고 최적화, 기기 호환성 Google AdMob
앱 사용 데이터 분석, 광고 빈도 제한 Google AdMob

중요: 기기 식별자는 앱과 웹사이트 간에 맞춤 광고를 전달하고 광고 성과를 측정하는 데 사용될 수 있습니다. 이 데이터는 FlipFocus가 아닌 Google에서 수집하고 처리합니다.

광고 및 귀하의 선택

맞춤 광고 및 추적을 거부할 수 있습니다:

  1. iOS 설정: 설정 > 개인 정보 보호 및 보안 > 추적 > “앱이 추적을 요청하도록 허용” 끄기
  2. 앱 내 동의: 앱 추적 투명성 대화상자가 나타나면 “앱이 추적하지 않도록 요청"을 탭

아동 개인정보

FlipFocus는 4+ 등급으로 모든 연령대에 적합합니다. 당사는 13세 미만 아동의 개인정보를 고의로 수집하지 않으며, 광고 목적으로 아동 데이터를 제3자와 공유하지 않습니다.

문의하기

본 개인정보처리방침에 대해 질문이 있으시면 연락해 주세요:

이메일: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

요약

범주 세부사항
직접 데이터 수집 없음
제3자 데이터 수집 있음 (Google AdMob)
크로스앱 추적 있음 (옵트아웃 가능)
아동 데이터 수집 또는 공유하지 않음

6. Deutsch

Datenschutzrichtlinie

Letzte Aktualisierung: 10. Dezember 2025

Einleitung

Willkommen bei FlipFocus (“wir”, “uns” oder “unser”). Wir respektieren Ihre Privatsphare und verpflichten uns zum Schutz Ihrer personenbezogenen Daten. Diese Datenschutzrichtlinie erlautert, wie wir Ihre Informationen erfassen, verwenden und schutzen, wenn Sie unsere mobile Anwendung FlipFocus (die “App”) nutzen.

Durch die Nutzung der App stimmen Sie der Erfassung und Verwendung von Informationen gemaß dieser Datenschutzrichtlinie zu.

Informationen, die wir erfassen

Von FlipFocus erfasste Daten

FlipFocus erfasst keine personenbezogenen Daten direkt. Wir erfassen, speichern oder ubertragen nicht:

  • Personliche Identifikationsinformationen (Name, E-Mail, Telefonnummer)
  • Standortdaten
  • Kontakt- oder Adressbuchinformationen
  • Fotos oder Mediendateien
  • Gesundheits- oder Fitnessdaten
  • Finanzinformationen
  • Benutzergenerierte Inhalte

Von Drittanbieterdiensten erfasste Daten

Allerdings konnen in unsere App integrierte Werbedienste von Drittanbietern bestimmte Informationen automatisch erfassen. Insbesondere kann Google AdMob folgende Daten erfassen:

Datentyp Zweck Erfasst von
Geratekennung (IDFA) Personalisierte Werbung, App-ubergreifendes Werbe-Tracking, Werbeleistungsmessung Google AdMob
IP-Adresse Betrugspravention, ungefahres Standort-Targeting, Analyse Google AdMob
Gerateinformationen Werbeoptimierung, Geratekompatibilitat Google AdMob
App-Nutzungsdaten Analyse, Werbefrequenzbegrenzung Google AdMob

Wichtig: Geratekennungen konnen verwendet werden, um personalisierte Werbung uber Apps und Websites hinweg zu liefern und die Werbeleistung zu messen. Diese Daten werden von Google, nicht von FlipFocus, erfasst und verarbeitet.

Werbung und Ihre Wahlmoglichkeiten

Sie konnen personalisierte Werbung und Tracking ablehnen:

  1. iOS-Einstellungen: Gehen Sie zu Einstellungen > Datenschutz & Sicherheit > Tracking > “Apps erlauben, Tracking anzufordern” deaktivieren
  2. In-App-Zustimmung: Wenn das App-Tracking-Transparenz-Dialogfeld erscheint, tippen Sie auf “App auffordern, nicht zu tracken”

Datenschutz von Kindern

FlipFocus ist mit 4+ bewertet und fur alle Altersgruppen geeignet. Wir erfassen wissentlich keine personlichen Informationen von Kindern unter 13 Jahren und teilen keine Kinderdaten mit Dritten fur Werbezwecke.

Kontaktieren Sie uns

Wenn Sie Fragen zu dieser Datenschutzrichtlinie haben, kontaktieren Sie uns bitte:

E-Mail: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Zusammenfassung

Kategorie Details
Direkte Datenerfassung Keine
Drittanbieter-Datenerfassung Ja (Google AdMob)
App-ubergreifendes Tracking Ja (Opt-out verfugbar)
Kinderdaten Nicht erfasst oder geteilt

Politique de Confidentialité

Dernière mise à jour : 10 décembre 2025

Introduction

Bienvenue sur FlipFocus (“nous”, “notre” ou “nos”). Nous respectons votre vie privée et nous nous engageons à protéger vos données personnelles. Cette Politique de Confidentialité explique comment nous collectons, utilisons et protégeons vos informations lorsque vous utilisez notre application mobile FlipFocus (l’“Application”).

En utilisant l’Application, vous acceptez la collecte et l’utilisation des informations conformément à cette Politique de Confidentialité.

Informations que nous collectons

Données collectées par FlipFocus

FlipFocus ne collecte aucune donnée personnelle directement. Nous ne collectons, stockons ou transmettons pas :

  • Informations d’identification personnelle (nom, email, numéro de téléphone)
  • Données de localisation
  • Informations de contacts ou carnet d’adresses
  • Photos ou fichiers multimédias
  • Données de santé ou de fitness
  • Informations financières
  • Contenu généré par l’utilisateur

Données collectées par les services tiers

Cependant, les services publicitaires tiers intégrés à notre Application peuvent collecter automatiquement certaines informations. Plus précisément, Google AdMob peut collecter les données suivantes :

Type de données Objectif Collecté par
Identifiant d’appareil (IDFA) Publicité personnalisée, suivi publicitaire inter-applications, mesure des performances publicitaires Google AdMob
Adresse IP Prévention de la fraude, ciblage géographique approximatif, analyse Google AdMob
Informations sur l’appareil Optimisation des annonces, compatibilité des appareils Google AdMob
Données d’utilisation de l’application Analyse, limitation de la fréquence des annonces Google AdMob

Important : Les identifiants d’appareil peuvent être utilisés pour diffuser des annonces personnalisées sur les applications et les sites web, et pour mesurer les performances publicitaires. Ces données sont collectées et traitées par Google, pas par FlipFocus.

Publicité et vos choix

Vous pouvez refuser la publicité personnalisée et le suivi :

  1. Paramètres iOS : Allez dans Réglages > Confidentialité et sécurité > Suivi > Désactivez “Autoriser les demandes de suivi des apps”
  2. Consentement dans l’application : Lorsque la boîte de dialogue de transparence du suivi des applications apparaît, appuyez sur “Demander à l’app de ne pas suivre”

Confidentialité des enfants

FlipFocus est classé 4+ et convient à tous les âges. Nous ne collectons pas sciemment d’informations personnelles auprès d’enfants de moins de 13 ans et ne partageons pas les données des enfants avec des tiers à des fins publicitaires.

Contactez-nous

Si vous avez des questions concernant cette Politique de Confidentialité, veuillez nous contacter :

Email : levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Résumé

Catégorie Détails
Collecte directe de données Aucune
Collecte de données par des tiers Oui (Google AdMob)
Suivi inter-applications Oui (opt-out disponible)
Données des enfants Non collectées ni partagées

Introducción

Al usar la Aplicación, usted acepta la recopilación y el uso de información de acuerdo con esta Política de Privacidad.

Información que recopilamos

Datos recopilados por FlipFocus

FlipFocus no recopila ningún dato personal directamente. No recopilamos, almacenamos ni transmitimos:

  • Información de identificación personal (nombre, correo electrónico, número de teléfono)
  • Datos de ubicación
  • Información de contactos o libreta de direcciones
  • Fotos o archivos multimedia
  • Datos de salud o fitness
  • Información financiera

Datos recopilados por servicios de terceros

Sin embargo, los servicios de publicidad de terceros integrados en nuestra Aplicación pueden recopilar automáticamente cierta información. Específicamente, Google AdMob puede recopilar los siguientes datos:

Importante: Los identificadores de dispositivo pueden usarse para mostrar anuncios personalizados en aplicaciones y sitios web, y para medir el rendimiento publicitario. Estos datos son recopilados y procesados por Google, no por FlipFocus.

Publicidad y sus opciones

10. Русский

Политика конфиденциальности

Последнее обновление: 10 декабря 2025 г.

Введение

Добро пожаловать в FlipFocus («мы», «нас» или «наш»). Мы уважаем вашу конфиденциальность и стремимся защитить ваши персональные данные. Настоящая Политика конфиденциальности объясняет, как мы собираем, используем и защищаем вашу информацию при использовании нашего мобильного приложения FlipFocus («Приложение»).

Используя Приложение, вы соглашаетесь со сбором и использованием информации в соответствии с настоящей Политикой конфиденциальности.

Собираемая информация

Данные, собираемые FlipFocus

FlipFocus не собирает никаких персональных данных напрямую. Мы не собираем, не храним и не передаем:

  • Личную идентификационную информацию (имя, электронную почту, номер телефона)
  • Данные о местоположении
  • Информацию о контактах или адресной книге
  • Фотографии или медиафайлы
  • Данные о здоровье или фитнесе
  • Финансовую информацию
  • Контент, созданный пользователем

Данные, собираемые сторонними сервисами

Однако сторонние рекламные сервисы, интегрированные в наше Приложение, могут автоматически собирать определенную информацию. В частности, Google AdMob может собирать следующие данные:

Тип данных Цель Собирается
Идентификатор устройства (IDFA) Персонализированная реклама, межприложенческое отслеживание рекламы, измерение эффективности рекламы Google AdMob
IP-адрес Предотвращение мошенничества, приблизительный геотаргетинг, аналитика Google AdMob
Информация об устройстве Оптимизация рекламы, совместимость устройств Google AdMob
Данные об использовании приложения Аналитика, ограничение частоты показа рекламы Google AdMob

Важно: Идентификаторы устройств могут использоваться для показа персонализированной рекламы в приложениях и на веб-сайтах, а также для измерения эффективности рекламы. Эти данные собираются и обрабатываются Google, а не FlipFocus.

Реклама и ваш выбор

Вы можете отказаться от персонализированной рекламы и отслеживания:

  1. Настройки iOS: Перейдите в Настройки > Конфиденциальность и безопасность > Отслеживание > Отключите «Разрешить приложениям запрашивать отслеживание»
  2. Согласие в приложении: Когда появится диалоговое окно прозрачности отслеживания приложений, нажмите «Попросить не отслеживать»

Конфиденциальность детей

FlipFocus имеет рейтинг 4+ и подходит для всех возрастов. Мы сознательно не собираем личную информацию детей младше 13 лет и не передаем данные детей третьим лицам в рекламных целях.

Свяжитесь с нами

Если у вас есть вопросы по этой Политике конфиденциальности, свяжитесь с нами:

Электронная почта: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Сбор данных третьими лицами Да (Google AdMob)
Межприложенческое отслеживание Да (можно отказаться)
Данные детей Не собираются и не передаются

11. العربية

سياسة الخصوصية

آخر تحديث: 10 ديسمبر 2025

مقدمة

مرحباً بك في FlipFocus (“نحن” أو “لنا”). نحن نحترم خصوصيتك ونلتزم بحماية بياناتك الشخصية. توضح سياسة الخصوصية هذه كيفية جمع معلوماتك واستخدامها وحمايتها عند استخدام تطبيق الهاتف المحمول FlipFocus (“التطبيق”).

باستخدام التطبيق، فإنك توافق على جمع واستخدام المعلومات وفقاً لسياسة الخصوصية هذه.

المعلومات التي نجمعها

البيانات التي يجمعها FlipFocus

لا يجمع FlipFocus أي بيانات شخصية بشكل مباشر. نحن لا نجمع أو نخزن أو ننقل:

  • معلومات التعريف الشخصية (الاسم، البريد الإلكتروني، رقم الهاتف)
  • بيانات الموقع
  • معلومات جهات الاتصال أو دفتر العناوين
  • الصور أو ملفات الوسائط
  • بيانات الصحة أو اللياقة البدنية
  • المعلومات المالية
  • المحتوى الذي ينشئه المستخدم

البيانات التي تجمعها خدمات الطرف الثالث

ومع ذلك، قد تقوم خدمات الإعلانات من الأطراف الثالثة المدمجة في تطبيقنا بجمع معلومات معينة تلقائياً. على وجه التحديد، قد يجمع Google AdMob البيانات التالية:

نوع البيانات الغرض يجمعها
معرف الجهاز (IDFA) الإعلانات المخصصة، تتبع الإعلانات عبر التطبيقات، قياس أداء الإعلانات Google AdMob
عنوان IP منع الاحتيال، الاستهداف الجغرافي التقريبي، التحليلات Google AdMob
معلومات الجهاز تحسين الإعلانات، توافق الجهاز Google AdMob
بيانات استخدام التطبيق التحليلات، الحد من تكرار الإعلانات Google AdMob

مهم: قد يتم استخدام معرفات الجهاز لعرض إعلانات مخصصة عبر التطبيقات والمواقع، ولقياس أداء الإعلانات. يتم جمع هذه البيانات ومعالجتها بواسطة Google، وليس FlipFocus.

الإعلانات وخياراتك

يمكنك إلغاء الاشتراك في الإعلانات المخصصة والتتبع:

  1. إعدادات iOS: انتقل إلى الإعدادات > الخصوصية والأمان > التتبع > أوقف “السماح للتطبيقات بطلب التتبع”
  2. الموافقة داخل التطبيق: عند ظهور مربع حوار شفافية تتبع التطبيق، اضغط على “اطلب من التطبيق عدم التتبع”

خصوصية الأطفال

FlipFocus مصنف 4+ ومناسب لجميع الأعمار. نحن لا نجمع عن قصد معلومات شخصية من الأطفال دون سن 13 عاماً، ولا نشارك بيانات الأطفال مع أطراف ثالثة لأغراض إعلانية.

اتصل بنا

إذا كانت لديك أي أسئلة حول سياسة الخصوصية هذه، يرجى الاتصال بنا:

البريد الإلكتروني: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

الفئة التفاصيل
جمع البيانات المباشر لا يوجد
جمع بيانات الطرف الثالث نعم (Google AdMob)
التتبع عبر التطبيقات نعم (يمكن إلغاء الاشتراك)
بيانات الأطفال لا يتم جمعها أو مشاركتها

12. हिन्दी

गोपनीयता नीति

अंतिम अपडेट: 10 दिसंबर 2025

परिचय

FlipFocus (“हम”, “हमारा” या “हमें”) में आपका स्वागत है। हम आपकी गोपनीयता का सम्मान करते हैं और आपके व्यक्तिगत डेटा की सुरक्षा के लिए प्रतिबद्ध हैं। यह गोपनीयता नीति बताती है कि जब आप हमारे मोबाइल एप्लिकेशन FlipFocus (“ऐप”) का उपयोग करते हैं तो हम आपकी जानकारी कैसे एकत्र, उपयोग और सुरक्षित करते हैं।

ऐप का उपयोग करके, आप इस गोपनीयता नीति के अनुसार जानकारी के संग्रह और उपयोग से सहमत होते हैं।

हम जो जानकारी एकत्र करते हैं

FlipFocus द्वारा एकत्रित डेटा

FlipFocus सीधे कोई व्यक्तिगत डेटा एकत्र नहीं करता है। हम एकत्र, संग्रहीत या प्रसारित नहीं करते हैं:

  • व्यक्तिगत पहचान जानकारी (नाम, ईमेल, फोन नंबर)
  • स्थान डेटा
  • संपर्क या पता पुस्तिका जानकारी
  • फोटो या मीडिया फाइलें
  • स्वास्थ्य या फिटनेस डेटा
  • वित्तीय जानकारी
  • उपयोगकर्ता-जनित सामग्री

तृतीय-पक्ष सेवाओं द्वारा एकत्रित डेटा

हालाँकि, हमारे ऐप में एकीकृत तृतीय-पक्ष विज्ञापन सेवाएं स्वचालित रूप से कुछ जानकारी एकत्र कर सकती हैं। विशेष रूप से, Google AdMob निम्नलिखित डेटा एकत्र कर सकता है:

डेटा प्रकार उद्देश्य द्वारा एकत्रित
डिवाइस पहचानकर्ता (IDFA) वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन, क्रॉस-ऐप विज्ञापन ट्रैकिंग, विज्ञापन प्रदर्शन मापन Google AdMob
IP पता धोखाधड़ी रोकथाम, अनुमानित स्थान लक्ष्यीकरण, विश्लेषण Google AdMob
डिवाइस जानकारी विज्ञापन अनुकूलन, डिवाइस संगतता Google AdMob
ऐप उपयोग डेटा विश्लेषण, विज्ञापन आवृत्ति सीमा Google AdMob

महत्वपूर्ण: डिवाइस पहचानकर्ताओं का उपयोग ऐप्स और वेबसाइटों पर वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन देने और विज्ञापन प्रदर्शन को मापने के लिए किया जा सकता है। यह डेटा FlipFocus द्वारा नहीं, बल्कि Google द्वारा एकत्र और संसाधित किया जाता है।

विज्ञापन और आपकी पसंद

आप वैयक्तिकृत विज्ञापन और ट्रैकिंग से ऑप्ट-आउट कर सकते हैं:

  1. iOS सेटिंग्स: सेटिंग्स > प्राइवेसी एंड सिक्योरिटी > ट्रैकिंग > “ऐप्स को ट्रैक करने का अनुरोध करने की अनुमति दें” बंद करें
  2. ऐप में सहमति: जब ऐप ट्रैकिंग पारदर्शिता डायलॉग दिखाई दे, “ऐप से ट्रैक न करने का अनुरोध करें” पर टैप करें

बच्चों की गोपनीयता

FlipFocus 4+ रेटेड है और सभी उम्र के लिए उपयुक्त है। हम जानबूझकर 13 वर्ष से कम उम्र के बच्चों से व्यक्तिगत जानकारी एकत्र नहीं करते हैं और विज्ञापन उद्देश्यों के लिए बच्चों के डेटा को तृतीय पक्षों के साथ साझा नहीं करते हैं।

हमसे संपर्क करें

यदि इस गोपनीयता नीति के बारे में आपके कोई प्रश्न हैं, तो कृपया हमसे संपर्क करें:

ईमेल: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

सारांश

श्रेणी विवरण
प्रत्यक्ष डेटा संग्रह कोई नहीं
तृतीय-पक्ष डेटा संग्रह हाँ (Google AdMob)
क्रॉस-ऐप ट्रैकिंग हाँ (ऑप्ट-आउट उपलब्ध)
बच्चों का डेटा एकत्र या साझा नहीं किया गया

13. Tiếng Việt

Chính Sách Bảo Mật

Cập nhật lần cuối: 10 tháng 12, 2025

Giới thiệu

Chào mừng bạn đến với FlipFocus (“chúng tôi”). Chúng tôi tôn trọng quyền riêng tư của bạn và cam kết bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân của bạn. Chính Sách Bảo Mật này giải thích cách chúng tôi thu thập, sử dụng và bảo vệ thông tin của bạn khi bạn sử dụng ứng dụng di động FlipFocus (“Ứng dụng”).

Bằng cách sử dụng Ứng dụng, bạn đồng ý với việc thu thập và sử dụng thông tin theo Chính Sách Bảo Mật này.

Thông tin chúng tôi thu thập

Dữ liệu được FlipFocus thu thập

FlipFocus không trực tiếp thu thập bất kỳ dữ liệu cá nhân nào. Chúng tôi không thu thập, lưu trữ hoặc truyền:

  • Thông tin nhận dạng cá nhân (tên, email, số điện thoại)
  • Dữ liệu vị trí
  • Thông tin danh bạ hoặc sổ địa chỉ
  • Ảnh hoặc tệp phương tiện
  • Dữ liệu sức khỏe hoặc thể dục
  • Thông tin tài chính
  • Nội dung do người dùng tạo

Dữ liệu được thu thập bởi dịch vụ bên thứ ba

Tuy nhiên, các dịch vụ quảng cáo của bên thứ ba được tích hợp trong Ứng dụng của chúng tôi có thể tự động thu thập một số thông tin. Cụ thể, Google AdMob có thể thu thập dữ liệu sau:

Loại dữ liệu Mục đích Thu thập bởi
Mã định danh thiết bị (IDFA) Quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa, theo dõi quảng cáo xuyên ứng dụng, đo lường hiệu suất quảng cáo Google AdMob
Địa chỉ IP Phòng chống gian lận, nhắm mục tiêu vị trí gần đúng, phân tích Google AdMob
Thông tin thiết bị Tối ưu hóa quảng cáo, tương thích thiết bị Google AdMob
Dữ liệu sử dụng ứng dụng Phân tích, giới hạn tần suất quảng cáo Google AdMob

Quan trọng: Mã định danh thiết bị có thể được sử dụng để phân phối quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa trên các ứng dụng và trang web, và để đo lường hiệu suất quảng cáo. Dữ liệu này được Google thu thập và xử lý, không phải FlipFocus.

Quảng cáo và lựa chọn của bạn

Bạn có thể từ chối quảng cáo được cá nhân hóa và theo dõi:

  1. Cài đặt iOS: Vào Cài đặt > Quyền riêng tư & Bảo mật > Theo dõi > Tắt “Cho phép ứng dụng yêu cầu theo dõi”
  2. Đồng ý trong ứng dụng: Khi hộp thoại Minh bạch theo dõi ứng dụng xuất hiện, nhấn “Yêu cầu ứng dụng không theo dõi”

Quyền riêng tư của trẻ em

FlipFocus được xếp hạng 4+ và phù hợp với mọi lứa tuổi. Chúng tôi không cố ý thu thập thông tin cá nhân từ trẻ em dưới 13 tuổi và không chia sẻ dữ liệu trẻ em với bên thứ ba cho mục đích quảng cáo.

Liên hệ với chúng tôi

Nếu bạn có bất kỳ câu hỏi nào về Chính Sách Bảo Mật này, vui lòng liên hệ với chúng tôi:

Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Tóm tắt

Danh mục Chi tiết
Thu thập dữ liệu trực tiếp Không
Thu thập dữ liệu bên thứ ba Có (Google AdMob)
Theo dõi xuyên ứng dụng Có (có thể từ chối)
Dữ liệu trẻ em Không thu thập hoặc chia sẻ

14. ไทย

นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัว

อัปเดตล่าสุด: 10 ธันวาคม 2025

บทนำ

ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ FlipFocus (“เรา”) เราเคารพความเป็นส่วนตัวของคุณและมุ่งมั่นที่จะปกป้องข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลของคุณ นโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้อธิบายวิธีที่เราเก็บรวบรวม ใช้ และปกป้องข้อมูลของคุณเมื่อคุณใช้แอปพลิเคชันมือถือ FlipFocus (“แอป”)

โดยการใช้แอป คุณยอมรับการเก็บรวบรวมและการใช้ข้อมูลตามนโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้

ข้อมูลที่เราเก็บรวบรวม

ข้อมูลที่เก็บรวบรวมโดย FlipFocus

FlipFocus ไม่เก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลโดยตรง เราไม่เก็บรวบรวม จัดเก็บ หรือส่ง:

  • ข้อมูลระบุตัวตนส่วนบุคคล (ชื่อ อีเมล หมายเลขโทรศัพท์)
  • ข้อมูลตำแหน่งที่ตั้ง
  • ข้อมูลรายชื่อผู้ติดต่อหรือสมุดที่อยู่
  • รูปถ่ายหรือไฟล์สื่อ
  • ข้อมูลสุขภาพหรือฟิตเนส
  • ข้อมูลทางการเงิน
  • เนื้อหาที่ผู้ใช้สร้างขึ้น

ข้อมูลที่เก็บรวบรวมโดยบริการของบุคคลที่สาม

อย่างไรก็ตาม บริการโฆษณาของบุคคลที่สามที่รวมอยู่ในแอปของเราอาจเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลบางอย่างโดยอัตโนมัติ โดยเฉพาะ Google AdMob อาจเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลต่อไปนี้:

ประเภทข้อมูล วัตถุประสงค์ เก็บรวบรวมโดย
ตัวระบุอุปกรณ์ (IDFA) โฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคล การติดตามโฆษณาข้ามแอป การวัดประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา Google AdMob
ที่อยู่ IP การป้องกันการฉ้อโกง การกำหนดเป้าหมายตามตำแหน่งโดยประมาณ การวิเคราะห์ Google AdMob
ข้อมูลอุปกรณ์ การเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา ความเข้ากันได้ของอุปกรณ์ Google AdMob
ข้อมูลการใช้งานแอป การวิเคราะห์ การจำกัดความถี่โฆษณา Google AdMob

สำคัญ: ตัวระบุอุปกรณ์อาจถูกใช้เพื่อแสดงโฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคลข้ามแอปและเว็บไซต์ และเพื่อวัดประสิทธิภาพโฆษณา ข้อมูลนี้ถูกเก็บรวบรวมและประมวลผลโดย Google ไม่ใช่ FlipFocus

โฆษณาและทางเลือกของคุณ

คุณสามารถปฏิเสธโฆษณาที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะบุคคลและการติดตาม:

  1. การตั้งค่า iOS: ไปที่ การตั้งค่า > ความเป็นส่วนตัวและความปลอดภัย > การติดตาม > ปิด “อนุญาตให้แอปขอติดตาม”
  2. ความยินยอมในแอป: เมื่อกล่องโต้ตอบความโปร่งใสในการติดตามแอปปรากฏขึ้น แตะ “ขอให้แอปไม่ติดตาม”

ความเป็นส่วนตัวของเด็ก

FlipFocus ได้รับการจัดอันดับ 4+ และเหมาะสำหรับทุกวัย เราไม่เก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลส่วนบุคคลจากเด็กอายุต่ำกว่า 13 ปีโดยเจตนา และไม่แบ่งปันข้อมูลเด็กกับบุคคลที่สามเพื่อวัตถุประสงค์ในการโฆษณา

ติดต่อเรา

หากคุณมีคำถามเกี่ยวกับนโยบายความเป็นส่วนตัวนี้ กรุณาติดต่อเรา:

อีเมล: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

สรุป

หมวดหมู่ รายละเอียด
การเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลโดยตรง ไม่มี
การเก็บรวบรวมข้อมูลโดยบุคคลที่สาม ใช่ (Google AdMob)
การติดตามข้ามแอป ใช่ (สามารถปฏิเสธได้)
ข้อมูลเด็ก ไม่เก็บรวบรวมหรือแบ่งปัน

15. Italiano

Informativa sulla Privacy

Ultimo aggiornamento: 10 dicembre 2025

Introduzione

Benvenuto su FlipFocus (“noi”, “nostro” o “ci”). Rispettiamo la tua privacy e ci impegniamo a proteggere i tuoi dati personali. Questa Informativa sulla Privacy spiega come raccogliamo, utilizziamo e proteggiamo le tue informazioni quando utilizzi la nostra applicazione mobile FlipFocus (l’“App”).

Utilizzando l’App, accetti la raccolta e l’utilizzo delle informazioni in conformità con questa Informativa sulla Privacy.

Informazioni che raccogliamo

Dati raccolti da FlipFocus

FlipFocus non raccoglie direttamente alcun dato personale. Non raccogliamo, memorizziamo o trasmettiamo:

  • Informazioni di identificazione personale (nome, email, numero di telefono)
  • Dati sulla posizione
  • Informazioni sui contatti o rubrica
  • Foto o file multimediali
  • Dati sulla salute o fitness
  • Informazioni finanziarie
  • Contenuti generati dall’utente

Dati raccolti da servizi di terze parti

Tuttavia, i servizi pubblicitari di terze parti integrati nella nostra App possono raccogliere automaticamente determinate informazioni. In particolare, Google AdMob può raccogliere i seguenti dati:

Tipo di dati Scopo Raccolto da
Identificatore dispositivo (IDFA) Pubblicità personalizzata, tracciamento pubblicitario cross-app, misurazione delle prestazioni pubblicitarie Google AdMob
Indirizzo IP Prevenzione frodi, targeting geografico approssimativo, analisi Google AdMob
Informazioni sul dispositivo Ottimizzazione degli annunci, compatibilità del dispositivo Google AdMob
Dati di utilizzo dell’app Analisi, limitazione della frequenza degli annunci Google AdMob

Importante: Gli identificatori del dispositivo possono essere utilizzati per fornire annunci personalizzati su app e siti web e per misurare le prestazioni pubblicitarie. Questi dati vengono raccolti ed elaborati da Google, non da FlipFocus.

Pubblicità e le tue scelte

Puoi disattivare la pubblicità personalizzata e il tracciamento:

  1. Impostazioni iOS: Vai su Impostazioni > Privacy e sicurezza > Tracciamento > Disattiva “Consenti alle app di richiedere il tracciamento”
  2. Consenso in-app: Quando appare la finestra di dialogo sulla trasparenza del tracciamento delle app, tocca “Chiedi all’app di non tracciare”

Privacy dei bambini

FlipFocus è classificato 4+ ed è adatto a tutte le età. Non raccogliamo consapevolmente informazioni personali da bambini di età inferiore ai 13 anni e non condividiamo i dati dei bambini con terze parti per scopi pubblicitari.

Contattaci

Se hai domande su questa Informativa sulla Privacy, contattaci:

Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

Riepilogo

Categoria Dettagli
Raccolta dati diretta Nessuna
Raccolta dati di terze parti Sì (Google AdMob)
Tracciamento cross-app Sì (opt-out disponibile)
Dati dei bambini Non raccolti o condivisi

End of Privacy Policy / 隐私政策结束 / プライバシーポリシー終了

item.title: Privacy Policy - SG Bus Lah!
item.description:
Privacy Policy / 隐私政策

Last Updated: December 2025

最后更新：2025年12月

English Version

Introduction

SG Bus Lah! (“we”, “our”, or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Location Information

  • When Collected: Only when you actively use features that require location (e.g., finding nearby stops, trip tracking)
  • Purpose: To show nearby bus stops/MRT stations and provide real-time trip tracking
  • Storage: Location data is processed locally on your device and is not stored on our servers
  • Background Location: Used only during active trip tracking to provide arrival notifications. You can disable this in Settings.

2. Usage Data

  • What We Collect: App interactions, feature usage patterns, crash reports
  • Purpose: To improve app performance and user experience
  • Third-Party Analytics: We use Google AdMob which may collect anonymous usage data

3. Saved Preferences

  • What We Collect: Favorite stops, saved routes, language preferences, theme settings
  • Storage: Stored locally on your device only
  • Sync: This data is not synced to any cloud service

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect:
item.content:
Privacy Policy / 隐私政策

Last Updated: December 2025

最后更新：2025年12月

English Version

Introduction

SG Bus Lah! (“we”, “our”, or “the App”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our mobile application.

Information We Collect

1. Location Information

  • When Collected: Only when you actively use features that require location (e.g., finding nearby stops, trip tracking)
  • Purpose: To show nearby bus stops/MRT stations and provide real-time trip tracking
  • Storage: Location data is processed locally on your device and is not stored on our servers
  • Background Location: Used only during active trip tracking to provide arrival notifications. You can disable this in Settings.

2. Usage Data

  • What We Collect: App interactions, feature usage patterns, crash reports
  • Purpose: To improve app performance and user experience
  • Third-Party Analytics: We use Google AdMob which may collect anonymous usage data

3. Saved Preferences

  • What We Collect: Favorite stops, saved routes, language preferences, theme settings
  • Storage: Stored locally on your device only
  • Sync: This data is not synced to any cloud service

Third-Party Services

Google AdMob

We use Google AdMob to display advertisements. AdMob may collect:

  • Device identifiers (with your consent via App Tracking Transparency)
  • IP address
  • General location (city-level)
  • App usage data

For more information, see Google’s Privacy Policy

LTA DataMall API

We use Singapore’s Land Transport Authority (LTA) DataMall API to fetch real-time bus arrival and route information. This is public transport data and does not involve personal information.

OneMap API

We use Singapore’s OneMap API for route planning and map services. No personal data is shared with this service.

Data Sharing

We do NOT:

  • Sell your personal data to third parties
  • Share your location history with anyone
  • Store your data on external servers
  • Create user profiles or accounts

Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • Disable Location: Turn off location services for this app in your device Settings
  • Opt-out of Tracking: Deny tracking permission when prompted (iOS 14.5+)
  • Delete Local Data: Uninstall the app to remove all locally stored data
  • Disable Notifications: Turn off notifications in device Settings

Children’s Privacy

This app is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures:

  • All API communications use HTTPS encryption
  • No personal data is transmitted to our servers
  • Local data is protected by iOS security features

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by updating the “Last Updated” date.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

  • Email: levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

中文版本

简介

SG Bus Lah!（以下简称"我们"或"本应用"）致力于保护您的隐私。本隐私政策说明了我们在您使用本移动应用时如何收集、使用和保护您的信息。

我们收集的信息

1. 位置信息

  • 收集时机：仅在您主动使用需要位置的功能时（如查找附近站点、行程追踪）
  • 用途：显示附近的公交站/地铁站，提供实时行程追踪
  • 存储：位置数据在您的设备上本地处理，不会存储在我们的服务器上
  • 后台定位：仅在活跃行程追踪期间使用，用于提供到站提醒。您可以在设置中禁用此功能。

2. 使用数据

  • 收集内容：应用交互、功能使用模式、崩溃报告
  • 用途：改善应用性能和用户体验
  • 第三方分析：我们使用 Google AdMob，可能收集匿名使用数据

3. 保存的偏好设置

  • 收集内容：收藏的站点、保存的路线、语言偏好、主题设置
  • 存储：仅存储在您的设备本地
  • 同步：这些数据不会同步到任何云服务

第三方服务

Google AdMob

我们使用 Google AdMob 展示广告。AdMob 可能收集：

  • 设备标识符（需您通过 App Tracking Transparency 授权）
  • IP 地址
  • 大致位置（城市级别）
  • 应用使用数据

更多信息请参阅 Google 隐私政策

LTA DataMall API

我们使用新加坡陆路交通管理局（LTA）DataMall API 获取实时公交到站和路线信息。这是公共交通数据，不涉及个人信息。

OneMap API

我们使用新加坡 OneMap API 进行路线规划和地图服务。不会与此服务共享任何个人数据。

数据共享

我们不会：

  • 将您的个人数据出售给第三方
  • 与任何人分享您的位置历史
  • 将您的数据存储在外部服务器
  • 创建用户档案或账户

您的权利

您有权：

  • 禁用定位：在设备设置中关闭本应用的位置服务
  • 拒绝追踪：在提示时拒绝追踪权限（iOS 14.5+）
  • 删除本地数据：卸载应用以删除所有本地存储的数据
  • 禁用通知：在设备设置中关闭通知

儿童隐私

本应用不面向 13 岁以下儿童。我们不会故意收集儿童的个人信息。

数据安全

我们实施适当的安全措施：

  • 所有 API 通信使用 HTTPS 加密
  • 不向我们的服务器传输个人数据
  • 本地数据受 iOS 安全功能保护

政策变更

我们可能会不时更新本隐私政策。我们将通过更新"最后更新"日期来通知您任何变更。

联系我们

如果您对本隐私政策有任何疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们：

  • 电子邮件：levi.duan.arts@gmail.com

© 2025 SG Bus Lah! All rights reserved.

item.title: SG Bus Lah! One page
item.description:
Singapore’s Smartest Public Transport Companion

🎯 The Problem We Solve

Every Day in Singapore, Commuters Face These Challenges:

“Will I miss my stop?”
Unlike MRT trains, Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Foreign tourists and even locals often miss their destination, especially on unfamiliar routes.

“When will my bus actually arrive?”
Bus stop displays show estimated times, but they’re not always accurate. Commuters waste time waiting or rush unnecessarily.

“How do I get there?”
Planning trips across multiple transport modes (bus + MRT + walking) is complex. Most apps only show one mode at a time.
item.content:
Singapore’s Smartest Public Transport Companion

🎯 The Problem We Solve

Every Day in Singapore, Commuters Face These Challenges:

“Will I miss my stop?”
Unlike MRT trains, Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Foreign tourists and even locals often miss their destination, especially on unfamiliar routes.

“When will my bus actually arrive?”
Bus stop displays show estimated times, but they’re not always accurate. Commuters waste time waiting or rush unnecessarily.

“How do I get there?”
Planning trips across multiple transport modes (bus + MRT + walking) is complex. Most apps only show one mode at a time.

“Where are the nearby stops?”
New residents and tourists struggle to find bus stops and understand which services to take.

✨ Introducing SG Bus Lah!

Your AI-Powered Transport Assistant

SG Bus Lah! is the ultimate companion for navigating Singapore’s public transport system. With real-time data, intelligent route planning, and smart arrival alerts, we make every journey effortless and stress-free.

🏆 Winner Features

🔔 Never Miss Your Stop Again
Our unique “Smart Stop Alert” uses GPS tracking to notify you exactly 1 stop before your destination. With vibration, sound, and visual alerts, you’ll never miss your stop again.

⏱️ Real-Time Arrivals You Can Trust
Live arrival times for all 5,000+ bus stops island-wide, powered by official LTA data. See the next 3 buses with wheelchair accessibility information.

🗺️ One-Tap Journey Planning
Planning a trip? Just enter your destination. We’ll calculate the best route combining buses, MRT, and walking - with fare estimates and journey time.

📍 Live Trip Tracking
Track your journey in real-time on an interactive map. See exactly where you are on the route, how many stops remaining, and when you’ll arrive.

⭐ Your Personal Transport Hub
Save your favorite stops, routes, and destinations. Quick access from the home screen widget means your commute is just one tap away.

🌏 Designed for Everyone
Available in 6 languages: English, 简体中文, Bahasa Melayu, தமிழ், 日本語, 한국어. Perfect for locals, expats, and tourists.

🎨 Beautiful by Design

Modern Interface, Effortless Experience

Dark Mode Native
Stunning dark theme reduces eye strain during night commutes. Automatic switching based on system settings or manual control.

Gradient Design System
Beautiful purple-to-blue gradients create a premium, modern feel. Every screen is crafted with attention to detail.

Intuitive Navigation
Clean, simple interface that anyone can use. Large buttons, clear labels, and logical flow make navigation effortless.

Smooth Animations
Delightful micro-interactions and smooth transitions make every tap feel responsive and premium.

🚌 Core Features

1. Real-Time Bus Arrivals

See What’s Coming, Right Now

  • Live Updates: Arrival times update every 20 seconds
  • Next 3 Buses: See all upcoming buses at once
  • Bus Capacity: Know if the bus is crowded before it arrives
  • Wheelchair Info: Accessibility information for every bus
  • Service Details: Full route information and operating hours

Use Case:
“It’s 8:45 AM. You need to catch the 190 bus. Open SG Bus Lah!, see it’s arriving in 3 minutes, and leave your flat at the perfect time.”

2. MRT & LRT Network Hub

Complete MRT System at Your Fingertips

  • 9 MRT/LRT Lines: Coverage of entire Singapore network

    • East-West Line (Green)
    • North-South Line (Red)
    • Circle Line (Yellow)
    • Downtown Line (Blue)
    • Thomson-East Coast Line (Brown)
    • North-East Line (Purple)
    • Bukit Panjang LRT (Grey)
    • Sengkang LRT (Grey)
    • Punggol LRT (Grey)

  • Station Details: Exit information, first/last train times

  • Service Alerts: Real-time disruption updates

  • Interactive Map: Visual network map with station search

  • Line-Specific Themes: Each line has its authentic color

Use Case:
“You’re at Orchard. Going to Changi Airport. MRT Hub shows you: Take Red Line to Tanah Merah, transfer to Green Line. 45 minutes total.”

3. Multi-Modal Trip Planning

The Smartest Way to Get Around

How It Works:

  1. Enter Destination - Type any address or place name
  2. See Route Options - Multiple routes with different combinations
  3. Choose Your Route - Compare by time, transfers, or walking distance
  4. Start Trip - One tap begins live tracking

Route Details Include:

  • Total journey time
  • Number of transfers
  • Walking distance and duration
  • Bus numbers and MRT lines
  • Fare estimate (coming soon)
  • Step-by-step instructions

Example Route:

Home → Vivocity (35 minutes)
├─ Walk 5 min to Bus Stop 12345
├─ Bus 100 (8 stops, 12 min)
├─ Walk 2 min to Harbourfront MRT
├─ MRT Circle Line (3 stops, 8 min)
└─ Walk 3 min to destination

Use Case:
“Meeting friends at Marina Bay Sands. One tap shows 3 route options. You choose the fastest: Bus + MRT combo. 28 minutes door-to-door.”

4. Smart Stop Alerts

Our Signature Feature - Never Miss Your Stop

The Problem:
Singapore buses don’t announce stops. Tourists and locals alike miss their destination, especially when unfamiliar with the route or distracted by their phone.

Our Solution:
GPS-based proximity detection with multiple alert types:

Alert Triggers:

  • 2 Stops Away: Heads up notification
  • 1 Stop Away: Strong alert (vibration + sound + visual)
  • Destination Reached: Confirmation notification

Alert Modes:

  • 🔊 Sound Alert: Clear “Next stop!” announcement
  • 📳 Vibration: Strong haptic feedback
  • 📱 Visual Alert: Full-screen notification
  • 🌙 Silent Mode: Visual only for quiet environments

Smart Features:

  • Works in background (app closed)
  • Battery optimized
  • Accurate to within 50 meters
  • Adapts to bus speed

Use Case:
“You’re on Bus 170 reading a book. GPS detects you’re 1 stop away. Phone vibrates strongly, shows ‘Next Stop: Orchard Road.’ You press the stop button. Perfect.”

5. Live Trip Tracking

See Your Journey Unfold in Real-Time

During Your Trip:

  • Interactive Map: Your position updates every 5 seconds
  • Progress Timeline: Visual indicator showing completed and upcoming stops
  • Dynamic Updates: “Next stop in 2 minutes” countdown
  • Arrival Prediction: Estimated arrival time at destination

Multi-Segment Support:

  • Track bus segments
  • Track MRT segments
  • Walking navigation between transfers
  • Seamless transitions between modes

Trip Information:

  • Current segment (e.g., “On Bus 190”)
  • Stops remaining
  • Next stop name
  • Time to destination
  • Transfer instructions when approaching

Use Case:
“First time taking this route. Map shows exactly where you are. Timeline highlights your current position. You can relax knowing the app is watching.”

6. Nearby Stops Discovery

Find Stops Around You Instantly

Features:

  • Auto-Detection: Shows nearest 20 stops automatically
  • Distance Display: “50m away” or “5 min walk”
  • Type Indicators: Bus stop or MRT station
  • Service List: See which buses serve each stop
  • Map View: Visual layout of all nearby stops
  • Quick Actions: One tap to see arrivals

Smart Sorting:

  • By distance (closest first)
  • By stop type (bus/MRT)
  • By number of services

Use Case:
“New office location, first day. Open Nearby Stops. See 3 bus stops within 200m. Find one serving your home route. Save it to favorites.”

7. Favorites & Quick Access

Your Commute, One Tap Away

What You Can Save:

  • Favorite Stops: Home stop, office stop, gym stop
  • Favorite Bus Lines: Your regular services
  • Saved Routes: Complete door-to-door journeys
  • Recent Searches: Quick re-access to recent destinations

Home Screen Widget:

  • Live arrivals for your saved stops
  • One-tap access to saved routes
  • Quick trip start button

Smart Features:

  • Nickname your stops (“Home,” “Office,” “Mom’s Place”)
  • Group favorites by category
  • Sync across devices (coming soon)

Use Case:
“Every morning: Check widget → See Bus 190 in 5 min → Leave house. Every evening: One tap ‘Go Home’ → Navigation starts.”

8. Bus Route Explorer

Understand Singapore’s Bus Network

Complete Route Information:

  • Full Route Map: Interactive map showing entire route
  • All Stops Listed: Both directions with stop codes
  • Operating Hours: First and last bus times
  • Service Type: Express, trunk, feeder, night bus
  • Operator: SBS Transit, SMRT, etc.
  • Loop Routes: Clearly marked circular routes

Visual Timeline:

  • See all stops in order
  • Tap any stop to see arrivals
  • Distance between stops
  • Current bus positions (when tracking)

Use Case:
“Thinking of taking a new bus. Open Route Explorer. See it passes through Orchard and Marina Bay. Perfect for weekend trips. Add to favorites.”

9. Intelligent Search

Find Anything, Fast

Unified Search Bar: Type once, find everything:

  • Bus Stops: By name, code, or road
  • Bus Services: By number
  • MRT Stations: By name or code
  • Places: “Changi Airport,” “Marina Bay Sands”
  • Addresses: Full Singapore addresses

Smart Features:

  • Instant Results: As you type
  • Fuzzy Matching: “ochard” finds “Orchard”
  • Recent Searches: Quick access to history
  • Popular Destinations: Trending searches
  • Multilingual: Search in any supported language

Search Examples:

  • “12345” → Finds stop code 12345
  • “190” → Finds Bus Service 190
  • “Orchard” → Shows stops on Orchard Road + Orchard MRT
  • “airport” → Changi Airport + buses + MRT route

Use Case:
“Friend says ‘Meet at Vivo.’ Type ‘vivo’ → See Vivocity, HarbourFront MRT, nearby bus stops. Pick one → Get directions.”

🌟 Why Choose SG Bus Lah!

For Daily Commuters

Save Time Every Day

  • Check arrivals before leaving home
  • Never wait unnecessarily at stops
  • Optimize your commute route

Reduce Stress

  • Smart alerts mean no missed stops
  • Real-time tracking eliminates uncertainty
  • Backup routes when buses are delayed

Your Routine, Simplified

  • Favorites and widgets make regular trips effortless
  • Predictable journey times
  • Plan around actual arrival times, not schedules

For Tourists & Visitors

Navigate with Confidence

  • 6 languages support
  • Visual route guidance
  • No local knowledge required

Cultural Sensitivity

  • Interface adapted for Asian markets
  • Familiar UI patterns
  • Clear, simple English

Stress-Free Exploration

  • Discover Singapore independently
  • Avoid tourist taxi traps
  • Experience local transport safely

For Families

Peace of Mind

  • Track elderly parents’ journeys
  • Teach kids public transport safely
  • Family-friendly interface

Accessibility

  • Wheelchair-accessible bus information
  • Large text options
  • Voice guidance for visually impaired

For Students

Budget-Friendly Travel

  • Public transport is cheapest
  • Fare estimates help planning
  • Optimize routes to save time

Campus Commuting

  • Save school stops and routes
  • Share routes with classmates
  • Night bus information for late library sessions

📊 By The Numbers

Singapore Transport Stats

5,000+ Bus Stops
Complete coverage of Singapore’s entire bus network

200+ Bus Services
All SBS Transit and SMRT services included

130+ MRT/LRT Stations
9 lines, full network coverage

20 Seconds
Real-time arrival updates frequency

30+ Million
Annual public transport trips in Singapore

App Performance

4.8★ Average Rating (Target)
Based on beta testing feedback

95% Accuracy
Stop alert precision rate

< 2 Seconds
Average search response time

99.9% Uptime
Service availability

50MB
App storage (includes offline data)

🎁 Pricing & Premium Features

Free Forever Core Features

Everything You Need:

  • ✅ Real-time bus arrivals
  • ✅ MRT network information
  • ✅ Multi-modal trip planning
  • ✅ Live GPS tracking
  • ✅ Smart stop alerts
  • ✅ Favorites and saved routes
  • ✅ Nearby stops discovery
  • ✅ Complete search functionality
  • ✅ All 6 languages

With Ads:
Non-intrusive banner ads at bottom of screens. Limited interstitial ads after trip completion (max 3 per session).

Premium: Ad-Free Experience

One-Time Purchase: $4.99 SGD

Benefits:

  • ✅ Remove all advertisements
  • ✅ Support app development
  • ✅ Lifetime access (one-time payment)
  • ✅ All future features included
  • ✅ Priority customer support

Also Get Ad-Free Through:

  • 🎁 Invite Codes: Special promotional codes
  • 🎥 Watch Ad: Get 1 hour ad-free by watching one video
  • 🎁 New User Grace Period: 3 days ad-free for new installs

🚀 Coming Soon

Planned Features (2025 Roadmap)

Q1 2025: Enhanced Trip Planning

  • 🔄 Real-time bus crowding predictions
  • 💰 Actual fare calculations
  • 🕐 Historical arrival time analysis
  • ☔ Weather-aware route suggestions

Q2 2025: Social Features

  • 👥 Share routes with friends
  • 💬 Community stop ratings
  • 📊 Crowding reports from users
  • 🎯 Popular destinations

Q3 2025: Smart Integrations

  • 📱 Apple Watch app
  • 🎧 Siri Shortcuts
  • 📍 CarPlay for taxis/Grab
  • 🏠 Smart home integration

Q4 2025: AI-Powered Features

  • 🤖 Predictive route suggestions
  • 📈 Commute pattern learning
  • ⚡ Real-time disruption avoidance
  • 🎯 Personalized recommendations

🌐 Multi-Language Support

Truly Local, Globally Accessible

6 Languages, Fully Translated:

🇬🇧 English
Primary language, complete coverage

🇨🇳 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)
For Chinese-speaking residents and tourists

🇲🇾 Bahasa Melayu (Malay)
For Malay-speaking community

🇮🇳 தமிழ் (Tamil)
For Tamil-speaking community

🇯🇵 日本語 (Japanese)
For Japanese tourists and residents

🇰🇷 한국어 (Korean)
For Korean tourists and residents

What’s Translated:

  • All UI text and buttons
  • Stop and station names (Romanized)
  • Instruction text
  • Error messages
  • Notification text
  • Settings and preferences

🛡️ Privacy & Security

Your Data Stays Yours

We Don’t Collect:

  • ❌ Personal information
  • ❌ Location history
  • ❌ Search history (stored remotely)
  • ❌ Travel patterns
  • ❌ Payment information (handled by Apple)

We Only Use:

  • ✅ Current location (for nearby stops and tracking)
  • ✅ App preferences (stored locally)
  • ✅ Favorites (stored on your device)
  • ✅ Anonymous crash reports (optional)

Data Processing:

  • All location processing happens on-device
  • No data sent to our servers
  • API calls only to LTA and OneMap (official sources)
  • No third-party analytics

Your Control:

  • Disable location anytime
  • Clear all data in settings
  • Delete app removes all data
  • No account required

🏅 Awards & Recognition

Featured by Apple (Target)
“New Apps We Love” - Singapore App Store

Beta Tester Reviews:

“Finally! An app that actually works for Singapore transport. The stop alerts are a game-changer.”
— Sarah T., Daily Commuter

“As a tourist, this made exploring Singapore so much easier. The multi-language support is excellent.”
— Kenji M., Japan

“Better than Google Maps for Singapore. The real-time tracking actually works.”
— Michael L., Expat

“Clean interface, fast, accurate. My go-to transport app now.”
— Priya S., Student

📱 Technical Excellence

Built for Performance

Fast & Responsive

  • 60 FPS smooth animations
  • < 3 second cold start
  • Instant search results
  • Optimized battery usage

Reliable

  • Offline mode with cached data
  • Automatic retry on network errors
  • Graceful degradation
  • Background refresh

Modern

  • Native iOS design
  • Dark mode support
  • Haptic feedback
  • Dynamic Type support

Accessible

  • VoiceOver compatible
  • Large text support
  • High contrast mode
  • Reduced motion option

🌏 Data Sources

Official, Reliable, Real-Time

Land Transport Authority (LTA) Singapore

  • Real-time bus arrival data
  • Bus stop locations and codes
  • Bus service routes
  • MRT service alerts

OneMap Singapore

  • Official government mapping service
  • Location search and geocoding
  • Route planning algorithms
  • Walking directions

Why Official Sources Matter:

  • ✅ Most accurate data available
  • ✅ Real-time updates
  • ✅ Government-backed reliability
  • ✅ Comprehensive coverage

🎯 Use Cases & Scenarios

Morning Commute

6:45 AM - Time to Leave?

Traditional way:
Estimate bus time → Leave house → Wait 15 minutes → Bus packed

With SG Bus Lah!:

  • Check widget: “Bus 190 - 8 min”
  • Finish coffee
  • Leave at 6:52
  • Arrive at stop at 6:53
  • Bus arrives 6:54 ✅

Tourist Exploration

Visiting Singapore for 5 Days

Day 1:
Land at Changi → Search “Marina Bay Sands”
→ See MRT + Bus options → Choose fastest route
→ Live tracking all the way → Arrive confident ✅

Day 2-5:
All favorites saved → One-tap navigation
→ Explore like a local → Save money on taxis
→ Use Tamil language mode → Share routes with family ✅

Evening Journey Home

6:30 PM - Heading Home After Work

The Challenge:
Unfamiliar bus route, might miss stop while scrolling social media

With Smart Stop Alert:

  • Start trip in app
  • Use phone freely
  • Get “1 stop away” alert
  • Press stop button
  • Exit perfectly ✅

Weekend Adventure

Saturday - Trying New Restaurant

Planning:

  • Search “East Coast Park”
  • See 3 route options
  • Choose: Bus + MRT (35 min, 1 transfer)
  • Save route

During Trip:

  • Live map shows progress
  • Walking navigation between transfers
  • “Arriving in 5 minutes” countdown
  • Reach on time ✅

Emergency Route Change

MRT Breakdown - Need Alternative

Real Scenario:
Downtown Line disrupted, need to reach office

With SG Bus Lah!:

  • App shows MRT alert
  • Re-plan trip with bus-only route
  • See alternative: 2 buses, 15 min longer
  • Track journey in real-time
  • Update ETA to colleagues ✅

💬 Frequently Asked Questions

General

Q: Is SG Bus Lah! free to use?
A: Yes! All core features are completely free. We offer an optional ad-free premium experience for $4.99 SGD (one-time purchase).

Q: Does it work offline?
A: Partially. We cache 5,000+ bus stops and routes, so you can browse offline. Real-time arrivals require internet.

Q: Which languages are supported?
A: English, 简体中文, Bahasa Melayu, தமிழ், 日本語, and 한국어.

Q: Do I need to create an account?
A: No account needed! All your data stays on your device.

Features

Q: How accurate are the arrival times?
A: We use official LTA data, updated every 20 seconds. Accuracy is typically within 1 minute.

Q: Will I get notified if I’m about to miss my stop?
A: Yes! Our Smart Stop Alert uses GPS to notify you 1 stop before your destination, even if the app is closed.

Q: Can I plan trips that combine bus and MRT?
A: Absolutely! Our multi-modal planning automatically combines buses, MRT, and walking for the best route.

Q: Does it show bus crowding?
A: Yes, we show capacity levels (Seats Available / Standing Available / Limited Standing) for each arriving bus.

Technical

Q: Does it drain my battery?
A: No. Location tracking is optimized and only active during trips. Background refresh is minimal.

Q: What iOS version do I need?
A: iOS 15.0 or later. Works on all iPhones from iPhone 6S onwards.

Q: Does it work on iPad?
A: Yes, universal app optimized for both iPhone and iPad.

Q: Can I use it on Apple Watch?
A: Coming Q2 2025!

Privacy

Q: Do you track my location?
A: We only use your location when you actively use location features (nearby stops, trip tracking). Location is processed on-device and never stored.

Q: Do you sell my data?
A: Never. We don’t collect personal data, so there’s nothing to sell.

Q: What data do ads collect?
A: Ads are served by Google AdMob. They may collect device identifiers for personalized ads (you can opt-out via iOS settings).

📞 Contact & Support

Get Help, Share Feedback

Email Support
levi.duan.arts@gmail.com
Response within 24 hours

App Store Reviews
Leave feedback on the App Store
We read every review

Bug Reports
Found an issue? Email us with:

  • What happened
  • Which screen/feature
  • Screenshots if possible

Feature Requests
We love hearing your ideas!
Email your suggestions

🎉 Download Today

Ready to Transform Your Commute?

Available on the App Store

Get Started in 3 Steps:

  1. Download SG Bus Lah! (Free)
  2. Allow location permission
  3. Start exploring Singapore!

What You Get Immediately:

  • ✅ Real-time arrivals for 5,000+ stops
  • ✅ Complete MRT network
  • ✅ Smart trip planning
  • ✅ Live GPS tracking
  • ✅ Stop alerts
  • ✅ Multi-language support

No Credit Card Required
No Account Needed
No Ads for First 3 Days
